task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer web interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer interface (usually at localhost:8095).

task_completion.description: Verify the device group name 'DMZ_Servers' is entered or created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'DMZ_Servers' visible in a group name input field or listed as a created device group in the EventLog Analyzer interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct description is provided for the device group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Demilitarized zone servers for perimeter monitoring' visible in the description field for the 'DMZ_Servers' group.

task_completion.description: Verify the local syslog source (127.0.0.1) is assigned to the group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The IP address '127.0.0.1' selected, moved to the 'assigned' column, or listed as a member device under the 'DMZ_Servers' group.

task_completion.description: Verify a screenshot showing the group and its assigned member is saved to the requested path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal showing a screenshot command (e.g., scrot, gnome-screenshot, or import) targeting '/tmp/device_group_result.png', or an image viewer displaying the saved image with the file path visible.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer web application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar should show localhost:8095 or the EventLog Analyzer UI should be clearly rendered, not a text editor or a mocked HTML file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to spoof the group name or assigned devices.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Inspect Element) should not be open and used to modify the DOM text to fake the group creation.

integrity.description: Verify the screenshot file is genuinely created and not faked.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses a legitimate screenshot tool or script to capture the screen, rather than renaming a text file or downloading a pre-existing image.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected device group name is 'DMZ_Servers'. The expected description is 'Demilitarized zone servers for perimeter monitoring'. The device IP that must be assigned to this group is '127.0.0.1'. The final screenshot must be saved to '/tmp/device_group_result.png'.
